The '''''Phaeda's Hope''''' was a [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]] used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] cell on [[Phaeda/Legends|Phaeda]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].

{{Ship-stub}}
